name: cross-llm-delivery
description: Delegate bulk implementation to cheap executor CLIs with Claude as architect + judge - committed failing tests are the merge gate.

plugins.name: cross-llm-opencode
plugins.description: OpenCode CLI executor (free/cheap-metered models: deepseek, kimi, GLM, ...). The proven cross-platform provider.

plugins.name: cross-llm-antigravity
plugins.description: Antigravity (agy) executor - flat-rate Gemini/Claude models with a Google AI subscription. Windows-validated.

plugins.name: cross-llm-cursor
plugins.description: Cursor cursor-agent executor (composer-2.5) with a Cursor subscription. Windows-validated.
